name: Oneflow Contract Automation API
what_it_does: Contract automation and digital contract platform with REST API — enabling teams to create, negotiate, sign, and manage contracts in a live digital format (not PDFs), with real-time collaboration, eSignature, automated renewals, contract analytics, and CRM integration for complete contract lifecycle management.
use_cases: Creating contracts from templates programmatically via Oneflow API
Querying contract status and signature progress for sales pipeline reporting
Integrating Oneflow contract events with Salesforce for opportunity close date management
Automating contract renewal reminders based on expiry date triggers
Pulling contract analytics (time-to-sign, negotiation rounds, win rates) for operations
not_for: Complex CPQ with product configuration (use DealHub or Apttus for CPQ)
RFP response automation (use Loopio or RFPIO)
Simple eSignature only without contract management (use DocuSign or HelloSign)
best_when: A B2B company wants to move from PDF-based contracts to live digital contracts with real-time negotiation, collaborative editing, and automated lifecycle management in a single platform.
avoid_when: You only need basic eSignature without contract management features, need complex CPQ workflows, or require RFP-specific automation.

auth.notes: API key from Oneflow account settings. Bearer token auth. Org-scoped access. Webhook for contract events (created, viewed, signed, declined, expired). Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive native integrations. No OAuth2.

pricing.notes: Swedish company (Stockholm). Founded 2012. Listed on Nasdaq Stockholm (IPO 2021). Live contracts differentiator — HTML/CSS contracts that auto-update, not static PDFs. Real-time negotiation with change tracking. Dual signature (counterparty edits while maintaining compliance). Strong in Nordic countries. eIDAS-compliant eSignatures. Expanding globally with CRM integrations.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for contracts, templates, parties, and signatures. Bearer token auth. Good API documentation. Contract templates must be configured in Oneflow admin. Live contracts support real-time editing — API creates from templates. Webhook for full contract lifecycle events. eIDAS-compliant signature flow.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contract reads idempotent. Template reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent. Contract creation not idempotent — check for existing before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Live HTML contracts differ from PDF-based contract tools — different rendering model
eIDAS compliance requires specific signing method selection per jurisdiction
Contract templates created in admin — not API-configurable
Counterparty negotiation is async — contract status reflects negotiation state
Publicly listed Swedish company — enterprise security standards apply

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, eIDAS, SOC2 compliant. EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Contract terms and pricing are highly sensitive — restrict API access. eSignature audit trail must be preserved per legal requirements. eIDAS compliance for EU legally binding signatures. Nasdaq-listed company with public company security standards.
